description_long: This kiosk features a rectangular, upright structure with a prominent glass or transparent front panel framed in dark metal. At the top, a blue illuminated sign reads 'dinoware' with a stylized arrow, suggesting branding or product advertisement. The front includes a horizontal push bar and a 'PUSH' label, indicating a door mechanism for entry or service. The sides are slim and reveal the depth of the frame, while the rear is plain and opaque. The overall design is sleek and modern, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality. The materials and signage suggest it is intended for commercial or retail use in urban environments.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with a glass front, dark metal frame, and illuminated 'dinoware' signage, featuring a push bar entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass panel, 'dinoware' sign, push bar, and 'PUSH' label.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slim depth and structural frame of the kiosk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, opaque panel with no signage or entry features.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, mirroring the slim frame and depth seen in view 1.
attribute_signage_type: illuminated sign above entrance with blue 'dinoware' text and arrow logo
attribute_window_presence: one large rectangular window on the front
attribute_door_configuration: single push door at the front
attribute_roof_design: flat roof, no visible overhangs or decorative elements, likely metal or composite material
